column1: Many of Mary Shelly's books were horror stories.
Mary Shelley's mother died when Mary was a baby.
Mary and Percy met for the first time in London.
Mary finally became close friends with Percy's father.
All the guests at Byron's villa created a ghost story.
Mary Shelley was deeply affected by the deaths of her children.
Percy Shelley's family offered Mary no money at all.
There is some doubt about the cause of Mary's death.
